title: AREPEEGEE (RPG), an Origins Addon
description: An addon for Origins, for those who wants to have a bit of RPG in their world.
body:
![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/63e401e5b557fd0cb43a749c691b0537dfbc7107.jpeg)
### Huge credits to [mischievouspixel](https://modrinth.com/user/mischievouspixel), who helped me out greatly with the texture work. Do check out their sick [Origins Addon](https://modrinth.com/mod/origins-adventurer)!


### Select a class from one of 5 types.

Pick **CHARGE** classes to annihilate those in your way or **TANK** your way to victory.
**SUPPORT** your friends or **AMBUSH** your enemies.
Or perhaps you want to **UTILIZE** what you're given instead?

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e9074ed7fe232cac5fd6ec6cbd6993be4554a3f8.jpeg)

The addon aims to add in a tiny bit of RPG aspect to Minecraft, featuring a functional allying system as well as simple but fun customizable "classes" with varying traits, able to cater to all sorts of playstyles.

**Also no, you don't need Origins Classes.**

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/435ae457406bc17062891402db1fab958cf76128.jpeg)

### -Can I add in other Origins add-ons/datapacks with this?
While it is possible, I don't recommend adding other Origins add-ons/datapacks along side this, as it is meant to be a stand-alone addon. It may cause problems with the AREPEEGEE addon and could break some stuffs/make stuffs busted.

I'm not stopping you, though.

### -How can I reset my stats?
Stats are able to be reset through an item called "Tattered Pen", more information can be found on the [Trello](https://trello.com/c/OfKfJpyL/31-list-of-recipes).

### -Can classes' DMG and base stats be modified?
Yes, they can.
I tried my best to code it in a way so you can easily change numbers for balancing and what not.
Please contact me through Discord (**helian12**), if you need any additional help. 

### -Are TANK classes coming?
yes they will please give me more time coding four classes is tiring theres only 2 people working on this rn

### -Will there be more classes?
Yes actually! I'm planning on adding a bunch of classes in waves, so stay tuned!!!

![.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/aa251502bacc59284bef04b0e0f764b618a71509.jpeg)
